"\071\111\108\098\112\069\120\119","\107\072\069\052\071\080\114\051\100\070\051\061","\055\099\100\104\109\051\061\061","\053\101\121\116\053\086\090\082\113\081\122\101\103\098\114\085\113\074\056\061";"\106\118\117\115\083\109\056\061";"\072\066\120\099\114\104\097\110\102\099\050\102","\110\070\078\054\117\057\078\052\054\097\113\111\086\051\061\061"}local function P(P)return H[P-(-98606-(-125291))]end for P,i in ipairs({{-886212-(-886213);-93624-(-93934)},{-693533+693534,7901+-7606},{-258818-(-259114),343817-343507}})do while i[-94119-(-94120)]<i[-1034782-(-1034784)]do i=#r return f(c)end,function(H)Y[H]=Y[H]-(494844-494843)if-526377+526377==Y[H]then Y[H],d[H]=nil,nil end end,function(H,P)local f=B(P)local w=function(w,D,r,j,c,d)return i(H,{w,D;r,j,c,d},P,f)end return w end,-289309+289309,function(H,P)local f=B(P)local w=function(w,D,r)return i(H,{w,D,r},P,f)end return w end,function(H,P)local f=B(P)local w=function(w)return i(H,{w},P,f)end return w end,function(H)local P,i=-878762-(-878763),H[369683+-369682]while i do Y[i],P=Y[i]-(-591896+591897),(-878246+878247)+P if-490210-(-490210)==Y[i]then Y[i],d[i]=nil,nil end i=H[P]end end,{}return(b(6691279-(-203304),{}))(f(c))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[P(982952-956073)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
